theme_and_archetype.description: An ultra-modern, VC-funded startup aesthetic. It relies heavily on high contrast, deep neutral bases, a vibrant Electric Blue accent for interactive elements, and glassmorphism. It uses expansive negative space, soft ambient shadows, and crisp typography to feel app-store-ready and luxurious.

guidelines.arabic_optimization: Arabic fonts must have slightly higher line-height (leading-loose) compared to English due to the diacritics and ascenders/descenders.
guidelines.hierarchy: Use bold weights (700-900) for active trip states, prices, and headings. Use medium (500) for labels. Avoid Light weights in mobile UI for legibility.

spacing_and_layout.system: Tailwind standard scale with native safe area paddings.
spacing_and_layout.safe_areas: Use react-native-safe-area-context for top/bottom margins. Bottom sheets must overlap safe area bottom with extra padding.

bottom_sheet.style: Glassmorphism preferred. Use expo-blur (BlurView) combined with a semi-transparent surface color.
bottom_sheet.shadow: shadow-[0_-8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.12)] in Light mode, shadow-[0_-8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] in Dark mode.
bottom_sheet.indicator: w-12 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-border/50 self-center mt-3 mb-4

primary.classes: w-full h-14 rounded-2xl bg-primary flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg shadow-primary/30

fab.classes: w-14 h-14 rounded-full bg-surface_elevated shadow-xl items-center justify-center border border-border/50

ride_option_card.default: border border-border/50 bg-surface rounded-2xl p-4 flex-row items-center justify-between
ride_option_card.selected: border-2 border-primary bg-primary/5 rounded-2xl p-4 flex-row items-center justify-between

inputs.floating_label: Use floating labels for pickup/drop-off. Background must match the surface. Height 60px, rounded-2xl, border border-border focus:border-primary focus:border-2.

map.style: Full screen absolute map. In dark mode, use a customized dark map tile URL for OSM or react-native-maps standard dark mode. No UI clutter. Overlays must float above it.

interactions.effect: Scale down to 0.97 on press (Pressable with animated style).
Concentric circle pulse effect using Moti from the center of the map or user location.
Use Expo Router default native stack sliding transitions. Modals should slide from bottom.

rtl_guidelines.layout: Rely on React Native's I18nManager. Flex direction automatically flips for `flex-row`. Explicitly use `marginStart` and `marginEnd` instead of `marginLeft` and `marginRight`.
rtl_guidelines.icons: Directional icons (like back arrows) must flip when `I18nManager.isRTL` is true. E.g. `<Icon style={{ transform: [{ scaleX: I18nManager.isRTL ? -1 : 1 }] }} />`
rtl_guidelines.text_alignment: Set `textAlign: 'left'` for default alignment, React Native handles the flip to right automatically in RTL. Do not hardcode 'right'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build this app using Expo React Native, strictly utilizing native components (View, Text, Pressable, ScrollView) combined with styling (NativeWind / StyleSheet).
For icons, use @expo/vector-icons (Feather or Ionicons) to maintain the clean app vibe.
Ensure I18nManager is configured for Arabic (RTL) out of the box. Use logical spacing (marginStart/End) globally.
Map implementation should use react-native-maps. Bottom sheet MUST float over it smoothly. Use @gorhom/bottom-sheet if possible, else a reanimated custom sheet.
All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid for automated testing.
The UI should look like a $1B VC funded startup: high padding, soft shadows, rounded corners, zero clutter.
